content.en:
"This realm god, what I need is resources that can strengthen the Eternal Dao Seed, and the side effects can't be very large. "

Qin Xuan said.

"How much does it take to trade the evil vines?" Ye Tian asked.

Evil vines?

Qin Xuan thought about it carefully, and then replied: "At least three evil vines are needed~!"

Ye Tian took out an evil vine, as well as two treasures similar to the evil vine, the value was about the same.

The main thing is that he gave all the other evil vines to his relatives, and there are only these kinds left on his body.

When Qin Xuan saw these three treasures, he immediately smiled and said, "Okay, then let's trade it immediately!"

Ye Tian and Qin Xuan immediately traded, and both parties were satisfied.

And this Tianyan Roulette completely belongs to Ye Tian.

In Qin Xuan's opinion, Ye Tian was a fool, after all, this Eternal Realm Treasure, he couldn't trade it in the Realm God Realm, so he came here to try it, but he didn't expect it to be sold.

As everyone knows, this treasure is too valuable to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian wanted to use the Tianyan Roulette Wheel to deduce the perfect Eternal Realm Spirit Method.

Eternal realm spirits are divided into lower realm spirits, middle realm spirits, and upper realm spirits, but in fact, there is a perfect realm spirit.

However, it is estimated that the Xuanxing Holy Gate does not have the method of perfecting the realm spirit.

Ye Tian didn't expect the Perfect Realm Spirit Method either, so he wanted to deduce it.

However, the Sun Disc couldn't deduce the Realm Spirit Law at all, because the grade was too low.

But this Tianyan Roulette has hope to be promoted, so Ye Tian is very excited at the moment.

......

Next, Ye Tian traded a few more Eternal Realm Treasures at this Realm Court Meeting.

And the real deal of this Realm Court Meeting is six places to enter the Realm God Kingdom Realm Realm Realm Headquarters, whoever pays enough price can enter the Realm God Kingdom Realm, and there is no need to stay in the Eternal Realm.

Ye Tian didn't want to go to the Realm God Realm right now, so he didn't get involved.

However, after this small meeting, he also knew very well that it was very difficult for ordinary Eternal Realm God Realm to go to the Realm God Realm.

The Realm Court strictly controls the entry of the Realm God Realm, and even the ordinary Eternal Realm Divine Realm is not allowed to enter, which shows why the Eternal Dao Realm powerhouse of the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance wanted to smuggle in, why was it wiped out.

I'm afraid that even the existence of the Eternal Realm God Realm will be wiped out if it is smuggled without the permission of the Realm Court.

After all, if it weren't strict, and all of these Eternal Realm Divine Realms would be smuggled, then they would not be able to control the Eternal Realm.

The value of the Eternal Realm is incomparably huge, and the Realm Court doesn't want to give it up!

Maybe one day the Eternal Realm will return to its former prosperity, and they will return.

They will never allow the Demon Seed to occupy the Eternal Realm.

Ye Tian can also understand, just like the Void Domain, there are no resources there, he still hasn't given up, and he will still send a copy body to guard the Void Domain.

Without his permission, the Terrans in the Void are not allowed to enter the Endless Realm Alliance without permission, and only the Terrans who have obtained permission can freely travel between the Void Realm and the Endless Realm Alliance.

The logic is similar.

......

After the Realm Court meeting ended, Ye Tian returned to the Endless Realm Alliance.

Surreptitiously.

Ye Tian found himself being targeted.

However, he pretended not to care and shuttled quickly.

Finally, a figure appeared and intercepted him.

"Qin Xuan!"

Ye Tian frowned.

"Qin Xuan, what are you stopping me?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Hahaha, I was almost frightened by you!" Qin Xuan sneered: "At first, I thought you were a certain Eternal Realm God Realm junior powerhouse from the Realm God Realm, but after inquiring about it, I realized that you are an Eternal Realm God Realm yourself. It seems that you have accidentally obtained the Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance, and you have found a lot of treasures similar to the Evil Vine, so that you can condense an Eternal Realm Spirit! Unfortunately, you have only cultivated one Eternal Realm Spirit, but you have condensed two Eternal Realm Spirits!"

"You're also a member of the Realm, and you're going to kill me?"

Ye Tian asked.

"I see, then I'm relieved!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"Relieved?"

Qin Xuan was a little incomprehensible.

At this moment, the aura on Ye Tian's body exploded.

Rumble!!!!

The Xuan Star Realm Snake urged, and the Xuan Star Scale Armor Technique, an eternal realm spiritual technique, was unleashed, and immediately urged the Chilin Ancient Spear, urging all the power to kill Qin Xuan.

With the power of his current blow, it was comparable to the Eternal Realm God Realm beginner powerhouse who condensed the three Eternal Realm spirits.

And Qin Xuan only condensed two Eternal Realm Spirits, and the two Eternal Realm Spirits condensed were only mid-rank Realm Spirits.

"That's the Chilin Ancient Spear, how could you have urged this weapon?"

Qin Xuan recognized it, and then he was terrified.

Didn't the demon seeds take this thing, how could Ye Tian have it?

Ye Tian is a demon seed?

That's not right!

However, he didn't have time to think, now he had to block Ye Tian's attack!

Rumble!!!

A piece of defense on his body, the Eternal Realm Treasure was urged, and the Eternal Dao Secret Technique was used to defend it.

His two Eternal Realm Spiritual Techniques, one is speed and the other is attack, so there is no such thing as defense, and he can only use the Eternal Dao Secret Technique to defend.

But his defenses were like papier-mâché.

Poof!

Ye Tian's Chilin Ancient Spear penetrated Qin Xuan's defense, if it weren't for the defense of the Eternal Realm Treasure to take effect, he was afraid that he would be finished.

But even so, he was still hit hard.

Followed by.

Ye Tian's attack is here again.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian's repeated attacks almost overwhelmed Qin Xuan.

"No!"

Qin Xuan still wanted to beg for mercy, but the gap in their strength was too great.

Poof!

Qin Xuan's body was completely penetrated, and his vitality was annihilated.

After killing Qin Xuan, Ye Tian took the treasure from his body and quickly left here.

Not long after, there was an Eternal Realm God Realm coming over, after all, a battle broke out here, so they naturally wanted to come over to investigate, but Ye Tian had already erased the traces, they didn't find anything, and they didn't dare to investigate.

Because judging from the fluctuations, it must be the Eternal Realm God Realm junior powerhouse who has condensed the Eternal Realm Spirit, and it is not something they can provoke.
